# Plan and Implement

## Change Summary

{"change_summary":"Added a br binary preflight and --br-path plumbing for bead create-project, pr, and drain command paths. The preflight resolves an explicit --br-path before PATH, reports the explicit path and PATH summary on failure, suggests nix develop and --br-path recovery, and includes the beads_rust install URL. Resolved br paths are cached into BrAdapter/ProcessBeadProjectBrPort/ProcessDrainPorts construction so subsequent br calls reuse the same executable.","outstanding_risks":[],"steps":[{"description":"Inspected existing BrAdapter construction and command handlers for bead, pr, and drain to identify all br-dependent entry points.","order":0,"status":"completed"},{"description":"Implemented preflight_br_binary in src/adapters/br_process.rs, including executable checks, PATH candidate resolution, structured BrNotFound details, and unit coverage for explicit path, PATH lookup, and missing br cases.","order":1,"status":"completed"},{"description":"Added BrAdapter::with_binary

## Steps
